title: Make "Status Updates" available in widget/dashboard and "Export board to Excel" feature
excerpt: Right now, you are unable to see any of the status updates in the “Board Updates” widget on a dashboard. You are also unable to export these updates in the “Export board to Excel” feature - only the standard updates are …

posts.author: erusso (Elizabeth R.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Right now, you are unable to see any of the status updates in the “Board Updates” widget on a dashboard. You are also unable to export these updates in the “Export board to Excel” feature - only the standard updates are included.

We currently use the status update feature when a client is moving along in their customer journey and we need to keep track of implementation notes during a specific stage. In our use case, this would help future CSMs/teams with being able to easily view important updates from the client’s implementation. The only way you can see these updates is under the item’s “Update” view and they got lost easily and aren’t searchable.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @erusso ,

If it’s still relevant to you, Board Email Report can be a workaround for your case. There are 2 types of automated reports on a board and item level. On an item level you can get the following reports:

  • Updates by a specific employee

  • Updates mentioning a specific employee

  • Updates containing attachments

  • Status updates

  • Last updates

You set up automation rules to get reports every day (week, month) with consolidated updates and detailed xls-report as an attachment. This is how the result looks for the report on status notes:

image798×505 28.9 KB

image1408×242 55.5 KB

You can test the app and check if it works for you. I hope you’ll find it helpful. Also, our team can make custom automation for your case in terms of item updates, just reach out to us.
